content: The 2024-2025 SOTA push for scalable active learning agent memory can be reframed around the core recursive property of general agents: every memory entry stored by an active learning agent is itself a mini meta-agent that proactively volunteers when its contextual relevance matches the agent’s current task, rather than being passively retrieved via similarity search. This replaces static memory indexing with a distributed active selection framework built directly from the agent paradigm itself.
